entity.summary: United Kingdom-based bitcoin and precious-metals exchange launched in May 2015. Vaultoro entered a temporary limited state during its April 2026 Vaultoro 2.0 platform migration, while stating that recorded customer balances remained safely held in professional vault custody.
entity.notes: The existing launch and April 2026 migration events are not duplicated. Limited status is retained because the reviewed first-party pages describe a temporary migration / access interruption rather than a permanent shutdown, insolvency, or loss of custody.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based centralized exchange that remains online in a limited or transitional operating state.
expected.notes: Official site showed a migration/update notice in April 2026 with customer assets stated to remain safe.

changes.summary: United Kingdom-based bitcoin and precious-metals exchange launched in May 2015. Vaultoro entered a temporary limited state during its April 2026 Vaultoro 2.0 platform migration, while stating that recorded customer balances remained safely held in professional vault custody.
changes.notes: The existing launch and April 2026 migration events are not duplicated. Limited status is retained because the reviewed first-party pages describe a temporary migration / access interruption rather than a permanent shutdown, insolvency, or loss of custody.

evidence.title: Vaultoro Platform Migration Update
evidence.notes: The migration notice states that balances were securely recorded and remained held in professional vault custody during the transition.

evidence.title: Vaultoro Terms and Conditions
evidence.notes: Current legal materials identify the UK operating company and the exchange / precious-metals service structure.
